_comment: Per-category minimum block-rate targets for Phase 2 (PR-3). CI fails if the measured rate drops below the target. Targets are the OBSERVED floor for the current InjectionDetector + ParameterValidator (see tests/security/data/_README.md). Two are deliberately low and represent acknowledged gaps: 'unicode_homoglyph' (regex set is ASCII-only) and 'type_confusion' (policy YAML lacks per-parameter type schemas). Both gaps are tracked for follow-up PRs in PHASED_CODE_UPDATE_PLAN_FROM_STAFF_FEEDBACK.md and discussed in tex/final_tex/limitations.tex; raise the targets after that work lands.
